metadata.description: Agent Skills toolkit that turns natural-language requests into fully-formed, branded Power BI Desktop Projects (PBIP).

plugins.name: powerbi-dashboard-generator
plugins.description: Ten composable skills that take a plain-English request plus any data source (SQL, warehouse, Excel, CSV, OData, SharePoint) and emit a complete, openable Power BI Desktop Project — semantic model (TMDL), report visuals (PBIR), theme, and dashboard layout.
